role: Northgate collapsed/out-of-order checkpoint with closed road, rubble vehicle block, and hidden Black Road foot access.

collision_rules.black: blocked rubble, walls, barricade, debris, trees, rocks, closed checkpoint structures

gameplay_rules: Northgate is officially closed and out of order.
Donny's van should not be able to drive deep into this chunk.
Rubble and collapse zones must stop vehicle entry.
Player can walk up to the barricade/checkpoint line.
Player cannot pass the closed barricade yet.
Hidden Black Road foot route can be unlocked later as an alternate path.
Use invisible Red Concord warning/detection zones near remaining cameras and warning lights.

phaser_notes.vehicle_limit: Add a vehicle-stop zone near the lower/outer approach so the van can enter only a short distance. Do not rely only on the general collision mask for vehicle behavior.
phaser_notes.player_limit: Allow Donny on foot to approach the barricade, but block passage beyond the closed checkpoint line.
phaser_notes.future_unlock: Later, an interactable Black Road trigger can open the hidden foot route without opening the vehicle road.

future_build_reminder.IMPERIAL_GALACTIC_NEWS_STATION: Empire propaganda news station / Red Concord media broadcast hub to build later.
